feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Question about 'Process Incoming VAT Invoices - China'
entry.content:
We are going to implement and estimate the effort & effect about implement SAP functions for China Full Digital e-Invoice (FDEI)  in S/4HANA. We check Help Portal, we got the following content, and there is something we are not clear, can any expert help to clarify? Our question is 'Is it possible to do the invoice verification automatically after implement the following BAdI, if the PO&item, GR quantity & value are attached to the FDEI？' Which means, whether SAP will  retrieve PO&item, GR quantity & value from FEDI and match the GR quantity & value based on PO&item in SAP, and identify the variance if there is any, then park/save (not post) SAP invoice?

“App Extensibility: Process Incoming VAT Invoices - China

  • BAdI: Mapping with Related Documents (FICN_TXI_BND_MAPPING)

    You can use this BAdI to serialize or deserialize the related documents of a VAT invoice. You can also use it to convert the business object keys for display of and navigation to the related documents, as well as get the status of the source business object.”

entry.title: Can Rapid FP&A be used with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise, and how to configure Standard CDS?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on implementing Rapid FP&A in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise. The documentation I’ve come across primarily mentions SAP S/4HANA Public & Private Cloud Editions, but I haven’t found clear guidance for S/4HANA On-Premise.

My Key Questions:
Can we use the Rapid FP&A Suite with the 2022 On-Premise version of S/4HANA?
The documentation and resources mention connectivity primarily for cloud editions, and I would like confirmation on whether the suite is compatible with on-premise.
Steps to Configure Standard CDS Views for On-Premise:
I am trying to configure the Standard CDS (for example, GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery found in the SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan model) in our on-premise S/4HANA environment.
We are facing issues, such as permissions errors and inability to refresh queries, which seem to be cloud-related setups. However, we are on S/4HANA On-Premise 2022.

I've looked for existing Standard CDS views related to FP&A in our on-premise system, but I haven't found relevant resources specific to on-premise.
Encountered a permission issue with GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery during refresh attempts (attached error).


Can the community help clarify whether the Rapid FP&A suite can be used with S/4HANA On-Premise?
If so, could you guide me through the steps required to configure the relevant Standard CDS views (or build custom ones) for FP&A models on-premise?
Any detailed steps, documentation, or guidance would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: SUM Upgrade Fails: Missing DDNTT Table & EA-DFPS Not Imported – Need Guidance
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm facing critical issues during a SUM upgrade of S/4HANA system (SID: S4D, DB: HANA 2.00.078) with SUM 2.0 SP22. The upgrade fails during the Extract phase with the error:

"EA-DFPS is in an undefined state that is not safe to be upgraded. Reason: Upgrade wasn't completed - Contact the SAP Support!"

Environment Details:

  • System: SAP S/4HANA (SID: S4D)
  • Database: SAP HANA (Version: 2.00.078.00.1715149848, DB SID: DDH)
  • Current Version: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 01 (02/2024)
  • Target Version: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 02 (10/2024)
  • SUM Version: Initially SUM 2.0 SP19 (PL10); later upgraded to SUM 2.0 SP22
  • OS: Linux X86_64 (OS Version: 2.34)

Problem Overview and Timeline:

  1. During the upgrade process with SUM 2.0 SP19, SUM attempted to access table DDNTT during the step Preprocessing, phase EU_CLONE_ALLSIZES.
  2. I confirmed by querying M_TABLES that the table DDNTT does not exist in the system.
  3. I then Reset and Cleanup the SUM process and I switched to SUM 2.0 SP22 in the hope that the newer version would handle the missing DDNTT differently.
  4. However, SUM now fails during the Extract step, at PREP_INIT/VALCHK_INI phase,  with the error message:
    "EA-DFPS is in an undefined state that is not safe to be upgraded. Reason: Upgrade wasn't completed - Contact the SAP Support!"
  5. Using transaction SPAM, I checked the package status and confirmed that all EA-DFPS packages are marked as "Not Imported".

Files Attached:

  • SAPup_troubleticket.txt (complete error summary)
  • SAPup.txt (SUM log)
  • Screenshot-SUM.jpg (screenshot of SUM error)

Has anyone encountered a similar situation where SUM fails due to a missing DDNTT table and EA-DFPS packages not being imported?

Any insights, SAP Notes references, or step-by-step guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Ben

Feel free to let me know if any additional details are needed.

entry.title: Controlling Issue Stor Location of Constituents in MRP Area
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

Good afternoon.

We have two MRP areas set up for our plant and several storage areas under each. We are also using PP/DS.

The problem we are having is that we cannot control the Issue Stor Location for Component A when we run the MRP for Product A. We want to set the Issue Stor Location of component A to storage location X or storage location Y or whatever we want.

Currently, even if I specify the Issue Stor Location of the manufacturing version of Product A as Storage Location X in MRP Area ①, the Issue Stor Locations of Components A, B, and C are not set to X. (X is an assumption that the Issue Stor Location is not set to the Leading storage location in the MRP Area ① setting in the PP/DS Location Master.)

Please help.

entry.title: Effort to implement document splitting
entry.content:
Good morning community, can you help me get a clear idea of ​​what requires less effort?

Effort to implement document splitting in a system already converted to S4Hana VS a system still in ERP.

Thank you!!

Francisco J. López

entry.title: S4HANA Vendor Condition Contract settlement error 0P2
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

 

in S4HANA vendor condition contract rebate settlement WB2R_SC. Got error WS043 

"Error in account determination for account key 0P2"

 

but I have set in OBYC for 0P1, 0P2, 0P3 already.

Pls advise

entry.title: I want retrive Data for Procuremnet
entry.content:
I want to WBS element using Join ESLL and EKKN. when I join EKKO,EKPO,EKKN,ESLL. For Material PO Data retrieve Correct but for the Service Line , If I have 3 different WBS element for Service PO and 6 entries in ESLL so for 1 WBS element 5 rows get repeated.So Total I have 18 records.

Join I used as follows.

EKKO-EKPO-     EBELN

EKPO-EKKN-      EBENP EBELN

EKPO-ESLL        PACKNO-PackNO-SubpackNo

entry.title: transfer requirements from MRP area to MRP area in MRP
entry.content:
Dear all.

We want to transfer requirements from MRP area to MRP area by MRP in PPDS.

Can this requirement be achieved using only the standard features of PPDS?
If you have any examples please let me know.

Regards.

entry.title: conditions Contract (delta accrual) in COPA
entry.content:
hello, I'm looking for an answer regarding conditions contract, from what I understand when I change % (and create a delta accrual document) in CO I will only get information at the payer level and possibly SKU. How do I get Sold To data i ACADOCA? top down in CO is not possible because below the payer there are several buing groups with different conditions. 

 

#conditions_contract #CCM #COPA

entry.title: SAP GUI Options Local Data -> File Lifetime
entry.content:
Some of our applications are using a "Directory for Documents" path, which is set in SAP GUI Options.

We have to change the path in configuration globally. We do not know how it is set.

We let our admins check Windows-Registry-Editor (regedit) and could not find where this path is set.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dunning procedure works for -1 and 1 days in arrears but not for 0
entry.content:
Hi,

For dunning procedure 1000, we want a line item to be dunned when the due date is 0. When you dun only one line item whose due date is the current day, the system does not dun it. However, if you enter it with a set of documents then the system does it right. In addition, we have tested to claim the line item when it is still one day overdue and when it is already one day overdue, and the system does it well. But when it is due today the following message appears: "highest dys in arrrs 0 smaller than min.arrrs 1-, no dunn.not." For us it does not make sense since it does it right when it is /- 1 due.

entry.title: Upload Customer Open Items (Fiori App F4051) --> Missing Field "Trading Partner" (BSEG-VBUND)
entry.content:
Dear experts,
My customer uses the Fiori app “Upload customer open items” (F4051). My customer also uses a validation that requires a Trading Partner No. (BSEG-VBUND) to be entered for certain revenue GL accounts. This validation also applies in this app.
However, the field is not present in the Excel template used for this app. There is no indication in the documentation if and how the field could be added. And the field is also nowhere to be seen in the draft overview after importing.
Is it generally not possible to use this app with the trading partner field? Or do any of you know a possible solution?

Thanks in advance for any advice!
Rado

entry.title: Batch Jobs working on VA02
entry.content: How to find out the Batch Jobs working on VA02,VL02N and VF02 in SAP.

entry.title: Inquiry on SAP Solution for e-Invoicing Compliance in Europe (Including Hungary)
entry.content:
Dear,
 
We are currently looking for a technical solution to comply with various e-invoicing regulations across Europe, including Hungary’s NAV Online Számla. Our company is using SAP S/4HANA and BTP services(Integration Suite, CF Runtime, HANA Cloud..etc), and we need to ensure seamless integration between our ERP system and different tax authorities across the EU.
 
Could you please provide guidance on:
1. The recommended SAP solution for e-invoicing compliance in Europe (e.g., SAP Document Compliance, SAP Integration Suite, or API-based integration).
2. Standard SAP APIs available for submitting e-invoices to different tax authorities (e.g., NAV Online Számla in Hungary, SDI in Italy, Chorus Pro in France, etc.).
3. Required configurations in SAP S/4HANA to generate e-invoices compliant with EU standards (e.g., XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, Peppol).
4. Relevant SAP Notes, documentation, or best practices for multi-country e-invoicing implementation.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Best Regards

entry.title: WHT 1099Misc report no item found "No items to report;Query DOC_SEL did not return any data."
entry.content:
Hello Folks!!!

I'm trying to run the Withholding 1099MISC report and getting this error saying no item found. 

All configuration performed in accordance with SAP requirements.

BP is set with WHT_type FE, and code 01. FI item proerply cleared. 

The requirement, which may be the issue: no WHT tax should be calculated/withheld, the client only want to issue the 1099 report describing how much was paid to the vendor. Does that make sense? 

Is it possible?

entry.title: TOP-DOWN
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Expenses in the cost place need to be allocated to profitability. Recipient = material, distribution criteria = sales quantity. How should I configure the Sender and Receiver basis? Can you please help me with this in detail.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Top-Down Distribution Receiver Problem(CO-PA)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am doing the top-down example in J55 scope item exactly. But the system gives an error that it cannot find a receiver. What is the reason for this? Can you please explain in detail how the sender and receiver basis works.

entry.title: Billing document not shown in BUSVOL report - CC#
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

Pleae guide me on the below issue.

Issue : We have Created a Single payee Condition contract with Business volume selection critetia as Customer and Product hirarchy (PH) with Level one.

System was indentified the business voulme with above combination  and shown the billing document in BUSVOL report .

In our material master we have complete PH with level 5, due to cleansing activity we replaced the PH in material master which is casuing incorrect values in Delta and Settlemnet , becasue after replacening new PH in Material master our billing documnet was disappread from BUSVOL report , but still exist in Customer Invoices - Business Volume Determination (WCB_VBRK_VBRP_BV)

Q: Please guide me is there any way that we can bring back the billing documnets to BUSVOL without change the PH back to original one . Becase, so far we are using the incorrect PH that is why replaced with correct one .

CC

Material master 

We have replaced the level 5 PH and Level 1 which is 05 is same before and after replace new PH ,but the billing document was removed from Busvol report .

Pleae guide me to fix the issue and guide me how system get the trnsaction data from Billing and table WCB_VBRK_VBRP_BV values to BUSVOL report.

Thanks,

Venkatesh Rampe

entry.title: Issue in artifical currency
entry.content:
- Is there another possibility in the SAP standard that the rates of the "normal" currency are stored in the system at the same time 

as the rates of the corresponding artificial currency?

o If so, how? 

o Which table is to be maintained and how? 

- Is there the possibility of chaining in the SAP system? 

o (Artificial currency is referred to normal currency, between normal foreign currency and EUR the exchange rate deposited by the 

Bundesbank in the table "TCURR" is used) 

o If so, how?

entry.title: Ekko-procstat valueis different when PO is released via ME29N and BAPI_PO_RELEASE
entry.content:
I tried to release purchase order using two different methods, 
1) ME29N tcode- here after release is complete ekko-procstat value changes from 03 to 05.
2) BAPI_PO_RELEASE - here after release is complete ekko-procstat value is not changing to 05 (release completed), it's still in 03(in release), 
Please help why this difference in behavior even though both transactions perform the release of PO.
